# Daily Log

<!-- Runtime append log. Do not edit manually.
     Each entry is appended by an agent using tools/file-write append.

     Entry format:
       ## YYYY-MM-DD
       - HH:MM:SS UTC | <agent-name> | <action> | <subject>

     Example (do not pre-populate):
       ## 2024-11-15
       - 02:01:44 UTC | self-reviewer | completed | weekly audit, 3 blind spots logged
